---
title: "Security Awareness for Teams Training"
subtitle: "A 1-day intensive workshop on building a human firewall for your organization"
description: "Intensive 1-day workshop that transforms team members into active defenders of your organization's security, focusing on practical security awareness, threat recognition, and building a security-conscious workplace culture."
page-layout: article
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        .m { --c: #F5A623; }
        .quarto-title-block { display: none !important; }
        </style>
  typst:
    toc: true
    number-sections: false
    margin:
      x: 2cm
      y: 2.5cm
format-links: false
categories:
  - security-awareness
  - social-engineering
  - security-culture
  - phishing-prevention
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">
<div class="m-hero" style="margin: -1em -1em 3rem; padding: 10rem 0 6rem;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width: 700px;">
    <h1>Security <span class="gr">Awareness</span> for Teams</h1>
    <p>Empower your employees to become your strongest security asset</p>
  </div>
</div>
</div>
```

## Training Overview

This intensive 1-day workshop transforms your team members into active defenders of your organization's security. Focused on practical, accessible security awareness training, this program addresses the human element of security—often the most vulnerable aspect of any organization's defenses. Participants will learn to recognize threats, implement basic security practices, and contribute to a security-conscious workplace culture.

### Next Session

- **Date:** August 15, 2026
- **Times:** 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM
- **Format:** Available in-person or live virtual
- **Prerequisites:** None - designed for all staff members
- **Price:** $495 per participant (includes materials, lunch for in-person attendees, and 90-day access to security awareness resources)

## Training Curriculum

### Morning Session: Understanding Security Threats

**Introduction to Security Awareness (9:00 - 10:30)**
- Why human behavior is central to security
- Common threat actors and their motivations
- The cost of security incidents to organizations
- Security as everyone's responsibility
- Interactive exercise: Security misconceptions quiz

**Social Engineering and Phishing (10:45 - 12:30)**
- Understanding social engineering tactics
- Recognizing phishing attempts across channels (email, voice, text)
- Real-world phishing examples and case studies
- Red flags and warning signs
- Hands-on exercise: Phishing email identification challenge

### Afternoon Session: Building Security Habits

**Essential Security Practices (1:30 - 3:00)**
- Password management and multi-factor authentication
- Safe browsing and email habits
- Mobile device security essentials
- Physical security awareness
- Secure remote work practices
- Hands-on exercise: Password strength assessment and improvement

**Creating a Security Culture (3:15 - 5:00)**
- Reporting security incidents promptly
- Communicating about security effectively
- Overcoming barriers to security compliance
- Supporting colleagues with security practices
- Action planning for team security improvements
- Hands-on exercise: Team security incident response simulation

## Learning Outcomes

By completing this training, participants will be able to:

- Identify common social engineering and phishing techniques
- Apply strong password management and authentication practices
- Practice safe browsing and email habits
- Secure their physical and digital workspaces
- Recognize and report security incidents promptly
- Contribute positively to the organization's security culture
- Implement personal action plans for improved security habits

## Training Methods

```{=html}
<div class="row mt-4">
  <div class="col-md-6">
    <div class="card mb-4">
      <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white">
        <h3 class="card-title mb-0">Interactive Learning</h3>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <p>This training uses engagement strategies designed to make security concepts memorable and applicable:</p>
        <ul>
          <li>Real-world phishing examples</li>
          <li>Security scenario roleplays</li>
          <li>Team-based security games</li>
          <li>Interactive quizzes and challenges</li>
          <li>Guided security practice exercises</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-md-6">
    <div class="card mb-4">
      <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white">
        <h3 class="card-title mb-0">Practical Application</h3>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <p>Our approach focuses on immediate behavior change and habit formation:</p>
        <ul>
          <li>Personalized security action plans</li>
          <li>Habit-building frameworks</li>
          <li>Real device security setup assistance</li>
          <li>Custom security guidance for your organization</li>
          <li>Post-training reinforcement resources</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Who Should Attend

This training is designed for:

- All employees in organizations handling sensitive data
- Teams who want to build a stronger security culture
- New employees as part of onboarding
- Staff who may be targeted by phishing or social engineering
- Remote workers who need to implement security practices independently
- Customer-facing employees who handle sensitive information

No technical background is required - this training is accessible to staff at all technical levels.

## Materials and Resources

Participants will receive:

- Digital security awareness handbook
- Phishing identification quick reference guide
- Password management tools guide
- Security incident reporting templates
- 90-day access to our security awareness resource portal
- Certificate of completion
- Regular security awareness refreshers via email

## Instructor

This training is delivered by the **CHENIST Team** — experienced practitioners who combine deep technical expertise with practical, real-world teaching. Our trainers work on live engagements and bring current industry knowledge directly into the classroom.


## Testimonials

```{=html}
<div class="row mt-5">
  <div class="col-md-6">
    <div class="card mb-4">
      <div class="card-body">
        <p class="font-italic">"After this training, our staff immediately started reporting suspicious emails that would have previously gone unnoticed. The practical, non-technical approach made security accessible to everyone, and we've seen a measurable improvement in our phishing test results."</p>
        <p class="text-end mb-0"><strong>— Cristina M., HR Director</strong></p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-md-6">
    <div class="card mb-4">
      <div class="card-body">
        <p class="font-italic">"The interactive format kept our team engaged throughout the day, which is rare for security training. Most importantly, people actually implemented the suggested practices - from password managers to MFA - because the training made the 'why' so clear and compelling."</p>
        <p class="text-end mb-0"><strong>— Mihai T., Operations Manager</strong></p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Related Offerings

If you're interested in this training, you might also consider:

- [Cybersecurity Essentials Training](/academy/trainings/cybersecurity-essentials/) - Our 2-day technical security overview for IT staff
- [Cyberhygiene Intensive Training](/academy/trainings/cyberhygiene-intensive/) - A complementary 1-day workshop on personal security practices
- [Human Firewall Security Awareness Course](/academy/courses/human-firewall-security-awareness/) - Our comprehensive 8-week security awareness program

## Download

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
<div style="margin: 2rem 0; padding: 2rem 2.5rem; background: rgba(245,166,35,0.06); border: 1.5px solid rgba(245,166,35,0.2); border-radius: 16px;">
<p style="margin: 0 0 0.5rem; font-weight: 600;">Download Training Details</p>
<p style="margin: 0 0 1rem; font-size: 0.9rem; color: #86868b;">Get the full training outline, pricing, and contact information as a PDF.</p>
<a href="index.pdf" class="m-b" style="font-size: 0.95rem; padding: 0.7rem 2rem; background: #F5A623;"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf me-2"></i>Download PDF</a>
</div>
:::

## Contact

Interested in this training?

- **Email:** [office@chen.ist](mailto:office@chen.ist)
- **Web:** [Book a free consultation](/booking/)

```{=html}
<div class="m">
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Book this training<br>for your team</h2>
    <p>Custom workshops with organization-specific scenarios and flexible scheduling.</p>
    <a href="/booking/" class="m-b">Book a Call</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Expert trainers &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Practical focus &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Team pricing
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>
```
